pr.title: Record: 5-expert Hedge Mixer + TTT (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.0745)

output.summary: GPU Hedge logistic mixer blends neural, n-gram, and entropy experts during sliding-window TTT chunks before GPTQ quantization to refine predictions.
techniques: GPU-vectorized Hedge logistic mixer over neural, unigram, bigram, trigram, and entropy experts
Score-first TTT with sliding-window eval chunks and AdamW adaptation of final blocks
GPTQ int5 quantization plus EMA calibration within the 600s budget
